texto: Stories which have failed either to become popular folk lore or to be embalmed in old newspaper files are in great danger of oblivion. If they are saved, often it is by the merest chance. And that chance may well depend upon one individual with a treasure-story bent and a retentive memory.
explicacao: Citação de Ruby Elhult sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Stories which have failed either to become popular folk lore or to be embalmed in old newspaper f…” articula reflexao, history, lore em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e lore.
